title: Globex — TCFD scenario analysis kickoff
transcript: Sofia (Globex, VP Regulatory Affairs): We want to run two climate scenarios — 1.5°C and 3°C — for the TCFD disclosure. Consultant: We decided to use the NGFS Current Policies and Net Zero 2050 scenarios as the baseline pair, since they're well-recognised by institutional investors. Dani (Globex, CFO): What's the timeline? Consultant: I'll deliver the scenario narrative and risk register by June 9. Dani: Can we compress that? Consultant: Not without compromising quality — six scenarios variables need cross-functional input. I'll send a data request template by May 26 so your team can start gathering inputs in parallel. Dani: Fair enough. Consultant: A key insight from running these analyses across multiple companies — physical risk is almost always underweighted relative to transition risk in early assessments, but it's physical risk that ends up dominating long-term capex decisions.
